sub_modules.sqrt_fixedpoint_initial_guess: Combinational block that scales the fixed-point radicand by 2^M, finds its most significant set bit, and generates a power-of-two initial Newton-Raphson estimate. It also detects zero input.
sub_modules.sqrt_fixedpoint_nr_step: Combinational Newton-Raphson iteration datapath implementing y_next = (y_current + (X << M) / y_current) / 2 using widened fixed-point intermediates and divide-by-zero protection.
sub_modules.sqrt_fixedpoint_convergence: Combinational convergence checker that compares consecutive estimates and asserts convergence when their absolute difference is within a one-LSB threshold.
